appraisal_events.evidence: Il en parlait peu parce que seul de sa table il était dreyfusard; les autres étaient violemment hostiles à la révision.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator frames Robert as the lone Dreyfusard at his table, surrounded by opponents, which locally places him in a position of social isolation and reduced ease of expression.

status_effects.explanation: Being the only Dreyfusard among violently anti-revision peers excludes him from the local group consensus and curtails his participation.
